name: Chiles Rellenos De Queso
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the roasted chiles in half lengthwise and remove the seeds.
2. In a bowl, beat the egg white until foamy.
3. Dip the chile halves into the beaten egg, then coat with flour.
4. Heat oil in a deep skillet or pot to 175°C (350°F).
5. Carefully lower coated chiles into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
6. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Stuff each chile half with cheese and serve immediately.
